_label_tier_note: HK Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: HK Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after HK Stage B precision guards

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Cross-border transfer: hosting in Singapore is authorised subject to encryption in transit/at rest and Hong Kong model contractual safeguards attached as Annex A; no onward transfers outside APAC are approved under this Schedule

Consent withdrawal: where consent is the lawful basis (e.g., staff wellness benefits), individuals may email privacy@verdantrise.example.hk to withdraw; processing based on legal obligation or contract will continue where applicable

Data minimisation: employment forms capture only name, role, work email, payroll alias, and emergency contact name; optional fields and any identity document numbers are suppressed unless a legal basis is documented
proposed acquisition scenario involving Amber Harbor Advisory Ltd

For the proposed acquisition scenario involving Amber Harbor Advisory Ltd by a VerdantRise subsidiary, only aggregated staffing metrics will be shared with external counsel, and all names will be pseudonymised prior to transfer.
Security testing: breach notification drills concluded on 2025-12-15; this note does not indicate any incident; queries may be directed to Mr. Koji Ng at compliance@verdantrise.example.hk.

uncertain.matched_text: DSAR: access and correction requests may be submitted using Form VR-DA-18 to dpo@verdantrise.example.hk; acknowledgements within 7 days and substantive responses within 40 days will be provided, consistent with PDPO ss. 18 and 22

uncertain.matched_text: Erasure: requests will be granted where data is no longer necessary and no statutory retention applies; processor deletion certificates will be recorded under Change Ticket CQ-HK-ER-2026-014

uncertain.matched_text: Retention: HR records are retained 7 years post-termination; fund AML/KYC records are retained 6 years after relationship end or longer if required by Hong Kong law; access logs rotate every 90 days
